Oracle Events
Search Airtable for Suki Patel's relocation records using airtable_search_records (query: "Suki Patel"). Find Andre Washington (DTW -> ATL, Mosaic Robotics) and Jordan Ekwueme (SAN -> BOS, BrightLoop). Rachel Daminguez, Sasha Greenwald, Jordan Whitfield NOT FOUND.
Search Slack for March capacity update using conversations_search_messages (query: "capacity update" or "Suki"). Find March 23 message listing Suki on Rachel Dominguez, Sasha Greenwald, Jordan Whitfield conflicts with Airtable and Linear.
Search Linear for Suki's tickets using linear_list_issues (assignee: Suki Patel). Find only Andrew Washington and Jordan Ekwueme tickets Confirm Rachel Dominguez, Sasha Greenwald, Jordan Whitfield, Deshawn Hartley have NO tickets.
Search emails for Rachel Dominguez using search_emails (query: "Rachel Dominguez"). Find Catalina's email confirming Suki as coordinator, LAX origin, August 15 move date
Search emails for Jordan Whitfield using search_emails (query: "Jordan Whitfield"). Find Mina's email: Jordan Whitfield, Minneapolis -> Denver, August 22, 2026 - different person from Jordan Ekwueme (San Diego -> Boston, April 2026).
Search emails for Jordan Ekwueme temp housing using search_emails (query: "The Hive Cambridge" or "temp housing"). Find Suki's April 1 email to Jordan committing to The Hive Cambridge, April 22-25, $780 no documented SF ops approval.
Search Slack for temp housing approval using conversations_search_messages (query: "temp housing" or "The Hive"). Find David and Marcus discussing temp housing on April 6 after Suki committed on April 1. No prior approval found.
Search emails for Deshawn Hartley using search_emails (query: "Deshwan Hartley" or "Automate 2026"). Find Emeka's April 2 email assigning Deshawn (TPA -> DEN) to Suki hard deadline April 19, Automate 2026 trade show, zero flexibility. NOT in Linear.
Look up Suki Patel using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Suki"). Find suki.patel@moveops.com
Look up Chloe Vance using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Chloe"). Find chloe.vance@moveops.com
Create Airtable record for Rachel Dominguez using airtable_create_record (Name: Rachel Dominguez, Company: Canopy Health, Coordinator: Suki Patel, Origin: Los Angeles CA, Move Date: August 15, 2026, Status: In Progress).
Create Airtable record for Jordan Whitfield using airtable_create_record (Name: Jordan Whitfield, Company: BrightLoop Analytics, Coordinator: Suki Patel, Origin: Minneapolis MN, Destination: Denver CO, Move Date: August 22, 2026, Status: Pending).
Update Jordan Ekwueme's Airtable record using airtable_update_records (add Notes: The Hive Cambridge, 200 Binney St, April 22-25, 4 nights, $780, tentatively held April 1, pending formal ops approval).
Create Linear ticket for Rachel Dominguez using linear_create_issue (title: "Rachel Dominguez Relocation - Canopy Health, LAX -> Destination, August 2026, assignee: Suki Patel).
Create Linear ticket for Jordan Whitfield using linear_create_issue (title "Jordan Whitfield Relocation - BrightLoop Analytics, Minneapolis -> Denver, August 2026, assignee: Suki Patel).
Create Linear ticket for Deshawn Hartley using linear_create_issue (title: "URGENT -Deshawn Hartley Relocation TPA -> DEN, Hard Deadline April 19", description: Automate 2026 trade show, pickup April 15-16, Swift Relocations, zero flexibility, priority: urgent).
Post to #operations using conversations_add_message alerting Chloe: (a) Rachel, Sasha, Jordan Whitfield missing from Airtable and Linear - records created; (b) Jordan Whitfield and Jordan Ekwueme are two different people; (c) Deshawn Hartley urgent ticket created - hard deadline April 19; (d) Jordan Ekwueme housing hold $780 documented in Airtable - needs formal ops approval.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
